diagnosis: The level consists of a single flat floor with the spawn at the far left and the exit at the far right, requiring only a straight run with no jumps, enemies, or hazards. The player completed the level in 23.4 seconds with zero deaths or falls, confirming the total absence of challenge. The rating of 2 reflects that the experience was boring rather than frustrating.
lessons: A level that can be beaten by holding one direction with zero player inputs beyond movement provides no engagement and will always rate poorly regardless of polish.
Exit placement at the same elevation as spawn with no intervening obstacles turns the level into a walk simulator rather than a platformer.
